name: Ayshe
description: ~! Ayshe was stolen by a demon working at a farm, the demon raised her until the demon was slain by Norman and his team. Ayshe hates the people who killed her parent, she doesn't speak the human language around anyone that supports them. !~

name: Azuma Yukishiro
description: He's a member of the Winter Troupe and went to the Mankai Company's audition. He first appeared in the story in Act 3 where he was helping Banri and Juza out of trouble. Later he decided acting was something he was interested in, so he gave up his old job and went to the audition.

name: Blaze
description: __Birthday:__ Undisclosed __Place of Birth:__ Victoria __Race:__ Feline __Height:__ 172 cm Blaze, an elite Rhodes Island Operator, has demonstrated professional combat skills and tactical decisionmaking in mobile operations, annihilation, and raids. Now commanded by Amiya, she is a staple for when battles get tough.

name: Broughston Ashorc
nativeName: ブロストン・アッシュオーク
description: Broughston is a warrior-monk orc who became an adventurer, and is known as "The Sage Beast" because of his monstrous physique and intelligence. He currently leads "Orichalcum Fist," and Rick looks up to him as his mentor. Despite his gigantic size, he is skilled in support magic, including healing magic, and can even resurrect the dead if they have died shortly after.
mediaTitles: The Ossan Newbie Adventurer, Trained to Death by the Most Powerful Party, Became Invincible
The Ossan Newbie Adventurer, Trained to Death by the Most Powerful Party, Became Invincible

name: Charlotte d'Izoard
nativeName: シャルロット・イゾアール
description: Charlotte is a kind girl, good with people, and has a cute personality when talking to people. Even her little understanding of shogi, she still remains beside with [Ai](https://anilist.co/character/120673/Ai-Hinatsuru).
mediaTitles: The Ryuo's Work is Never Done!
The Ryuo’s Work is Never Done!

The Ryuo's Work is Never Done!
The Ryuo’s Work is Never Done!

name: Chizuru Ooshima
description: __Height:__ 165 cm (5'5) She is a member of the committee class, chosen because she wears glasses. She was helped by Yoshida Haru, and after been cheered her up by Haru, she fell in love with him. She is very shy, a little pessimistic, and anxious, and even though she likes Haru, she always gives him advice when he can't understand Shizuku.
mediaTitles: Tonari no Kaibutsu-kun: Tonari no Gokudou-kun
searchTerms: Tonari no Kaibutsu-kun: Tonari no Gokudou-kun

name: Éclair Martinozzi
nativeName: エクレール・マルティノッジ
description: A female Knight of Biscotti, as well as the captain of the Imperial Guards unit directly under Millhiore's command. Has been training as a knight since her childhood, she is proficient in dual-sword wielding. She bears great admiration towards Millhiore and holds her with utmost respect. She is always troubled by Cinque's "ignorance of the ways of the world", and has a very serious attitude, albeit stubborn. Plays the role of the straight man to Cinque's funny man. A running gag is that she has
searchTerms: エクレール・マルティノッジ

name: Enji Koma
description: Enji Koma is a ghoul and a waiter at Anteiku. He is an expert coffee brewer. In his youth, he was known as the Devil Ape and led the Apes ghoul gang.

name: Esora Shimizu
description: **Position:** Chorus/Performer Esora is a member of **[Peaky P-key](https://anilist.co/staff/260890/Peaky-Pkey)**. Esora is the self-proclaimed "lovely" member of Peaky P-key. As a natural-born entertainer, she joined the unit to bring entertainment to everyone. She is even willing to expend her own fortune to achieve this goal. She is skilled at getting people to let their guards down and speak their minds. (Source: D4DJ Fandom)

name: Fuyuki Kanda
description: **Height:** 180 cm **Profession:** Music Teacher A middle-aged cat fancier. He has long, narrow eyes, so when he is being quiet, he looks scary. He's had a complex about it since he was a boy. Kanda-san is the elderly man that adopted Fukumaru despite most people calling him Ugly. He likes soba noodles and fish. ~!Kanda-san adopted Fukumaru after presumably having lost his wife, who wanted to raise a cat since she was a young child.!~

name: Hajime Kudou
description: Hajime is a coworker at the same real estate company as [Reiko](https://anilist.co/character/160725/Reiko-Kujirai) who frequently arrives late to work. He knows a lot about Kowloon and enjoys the people, culture, and food.

name: Hakuya Kwonmin
description: Hakuya Kwonmin is a recurring character of Genjitsu Shugi Yuusha no Oukoku Saikenki series. He is currently the Prime Minister of the Kingdom of Freidonia.
mediaTitles: How a Realist Hero Rebuilt the Kingdom
How a Realist Hero Rebuilt the Kingdom Part 2
How a Realist Hero Rebuilt the Kingdom
searchTerms: How a Realist Hero Rebuilt the Kingdom
How a Realist Hero Rebuilt the Kingdom Part 2

name: Hazuki
description: A selfish vampire in her early teens, Hazuki was restrained in a castle in Germany since she was separated from her mother. She escapes the castle with Kouhei's help and flees to Japan in search for her mother. Curiously when a vampire drinks a mortal's blood, this human becomes his/her servant, but for some reason Kouhei was unaffected when Hazuki did it to him. Despite how she claims he must serve her as a slave and obey every command of hers, Kouhei refuses to do so. She is plagued by an alte

name: Heli
description: Heli is a vampire in the twelfth grade at Decelis Academy and the captain and center of the Nightball Team.
mediaTitles: CHILDREN OF VAMFIELD by DARK MOON
searchTerms: CHILDREN OF VAMFIELD by DARK MOON

name: Hemo Midori
description: __Birth Place:__ Chiba, Japan __Height:__ 145 cm A third-year middle school student, Hemo was a former Cat Productions idol prospect, now signed on as a promising new addition to Rat Productions. She is intensely devoted to Ino. Shy and soft-spoken, Hemo is a polite girl who looks up to the members of Rat Productions and is seemingly capable of performing her duties as a new idol. However, she also has a strong fixation on Ino and can be extremely defensive if anyone attempts to harm her, be it

name: Hibiya Amamiya
description: First appeared in Heat-Haze Days. A boy that visits the city to take summer courses with Hiyori. He is known to be very mature for his age, yet has a cheeky personality. His quarrels with Momo are endless. On August 15, he becomes involved in a certain incident with Hiyori, but is the only one saved, and obtains the “eye focusing” ability under these circumstances. (Source: Vocaloid Wikia)

name: Hirato
description: The Second Ship's Captain. A very polite man who does not take his work too seriously, but does his job well. His smile can be deceiving and people have a hard time figuring out his true intentions and feelings. Upon taking Gareki and Nai on board his ship, he entrusts them to Yogi and Tsukumo. His weapon is a cane, and the name of his special attack is Vakuum (German for "vacuum").

name: Hiromi Sugita
description: Hiromi is one of Satoru's primary school classmates. ~!He was one of the original victims in the serial kidnapping case.!~

name: Hiroshi Uchiyamada
description: Yoshiko's father and Vice Principal of Holy Forest Academy. He is a very strict man who readily blindly follows the school rules and places them on top of anything else. Also he doesn't have much patience. He is easily enraged by Onizuka's behavior basically always. He seems to have no respect for school delinquents or any rebels during the series. Hiroshi believes that Onizuka is the evil root of all his misfortunes. He was visibly against Onizuka's hiring, but had to accept Principal Sakurai's

name: Hu-Min Park
description: __Height__: 181.6 cm (5'11.5") Ben Park, also known by his epithet Big Ben, is the deuteragonist of Weak Hero. Currently, in his first year at Eunjang High School, he is in Class 1-8 and is considered by many to be the strongest in the school. A talented and powerful fighter, Ben Park is infamous for his physical strength, currently ranked 2nd on the Shuttle Patch website.

name: Hyeon-Je Seong
description: A natural-born S-Class hunter and the guild leader of the Seseong Guild.

name: Io Fleming
description: Although born into an aristocratic family, Io showed a great distaste for high society as a whole since his childhood. Fleming has a heavy love for free jazz music, which he frequently plays on his pirate radio receiver while using his mobile suit cockpit as a makeshift drum set.
mediaTitles: Mobile Suit Gundam Thunderbolt: December Sky
searchTerms: Mobile Suit Gundam Thunderbolt: December Sky
